Notes:
Don't include? Perception studies aren't necessarily trying to maximize realism ... but it is still an interesting tension they face

"The stimuli chosen are rarely seen in such a simple format “in the wild.” What they do represent are the basic encodings and building blocks for many types of visualizations. Our goal is to empirically test these encodings and enable other researchers and designers to determine how the encodings come together to create various visualizations."
